# Mission

**SwiftOpenUI** — Write SwiftUI, run anywhere.

A cross-platform declarative UI framework that lets SwiftUI developers bring their code to Linux, Windows, and beyond. One API, multiple native backends.

## Goals

- Familiar SwiftUI syntax — minimal learning curve for SwiftUI developers
- Platform-native rendering — GTK4 on Linux, Win32/Direct2D on Windows, more in the future
- Single codebase — `swift run` just works on any supported platform
- Community-driven — open source, extensible backend architecture

## Non-goals

- Pixel-perfect SwiftUI replication — we embrace platform-native look and feel
- Replacing SwiftUI on Apple platforms — use the real thing there
